Patient: follow-up post-repair

23-year-old female, 5 years post end-to-end coarctation repair. Routine
surveillance CT angiography.

Vitals:
- Heart rate 66 bpm
- Upper-limb BP 115/70 mmHg
- Lower-limb BP 114/72 mmHg (minimal gradient — good repair)
- Cardiac output estimate from echo: 4.4 L/min
- BSA 1.58 m²

Imaging:
- Gated CT with ECG triggering, full thoracic aorta segmentation
  completed. STL files in millimetres. No 4D flow acquired.

Clinical question:
- Document baseline hemodynamics for longitudinal comparison at next
  follow-up in 2 years. Pressure drop at repair site is the primary
  endpoint; WSS is secondary and will be reported comparatively rather
  than as an absolute magnitude. Standard numerics are fine.
